name: low_resource_iot
description: IoT profile under reference v2: L=16, N=1024 preserved (memory-constrained devices); v2 design philosophy applied where it scales (s 3->4 sparsity, CandMax disabled = -8 same as cut_limit, MaxIter=500 explicit). h_P=4 retained as IoT semantics (32-bit Final hashes, lambda_preimage = 80 bits low-resource trade-off vs. reference v2's 120 bits). Carries forward v1 F13 closure (h_P=3->4 to close 2.5% KeysMatch gap). Replaces v1 calibration; pending F13-v2 re-validation.
